scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && cdk deploy AppStack-dev -c environment=dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && cdk deploy AppStack-prod -c environment=prod
scripts.deploy:all:dev: npm run build && cdk deploy --all -c environment=dev
scripts.deploy:all:prod: npm run build && cdk deploy --all -c environment=prod
scripts.diff:dev: npm run build && cdk diff AppStack-dev -c environment=dev
scripts.diff:prod: npm run build && cdk diff AppStack-prod -c environment=prod
scripts.synth:dev: npm run build && cdk synth AppStack-dev -c environment=dev
scripts.synth:prod: npm run build && cdk synth AppStack-prod -c environment=prod
